item.title: IRAN CLAIMS STRIKES ON AMAZON DATA CENTER, U.S. BASE IRAN’S REVOLUTIONARY GUARD CLAIMED IT STRUCK AMAZON DATA CENTER INFRASTRUCTURE IN BAHRAIN IN RETALIATION FOR A U.S. ATTACK ON THE DARKHOVIN NUCLEAR
item.description: pIRAN CLAIMS STRIKES ON AMAZON DATA CENTER, U.S. BASEbr /br /IRAN’S REVOLUTIONARY GUARD CLAIMED IT STRUCK AMAZON DATA CENTER INFRASTRUCTURE IN BAHRAIN IN RETALIATION FOR A U.S. ATTACK ON THE DARKHOVIN NUCLEAR PROJECT. THE IRGC ALSO SAID IT TARGETED A U.S. MILITARY BASE IN JORDAN, CLAIMING TO HAVE DE

item.title: R to @SciTechera: Keep in mind! Every new quantum material is another step toward technologies we couldn't build before ♥️!
item.description: pKeep in mind!br /br /Every new quantum material is another step toward technologies we couldn't build before ♥️!/p

item.title: CVE-2026-15900 Use after free in GPU in Google Chrome on Android prior to 150.0.7871.128 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (… https://www.cve.o
item.description: pCVE-2026-15900 Use after free in GPU in Google Chrome on Android prior to 150.0.7871.128 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (… a href="https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-15900"cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-202…/a/p

item.title: RT by @ylecun: 🦔A Nikkei investigation found that Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, and Oracle have $1.65 trillion in debt that doesn't appear on their balance sheets, more than the $1.35 trillion th
item.description: p🦔A Nikkei investigation found that Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, and Oracle have $1.65 trillion in debt that doesn't appear on their balance sheets, more than the $1.35 trillion they officially report. These are GPU contracts, data center leases, and joint ventures that don't count as debt und

item.title: Hut 8 and IREN Secure Major AI Deals as Crypto Miners Expand Beyond Bitcoin Hut 8 signed a second 15-year AI data center lease worth $9.8 billion, fully commercializing its 1 GW Beacon Point campus in
item.description: pHut 8 and IREN Secure Major AI Deals as Crypto Miners Expand Beyond Bitcoin br /br /Hut 8 signed a second 15-year AI data center lease worth $9.8 billion, fully commercializing its 1 GW Beacon Point campus in Texas. Separately, IREN secured $2.8 billion in new multi-year AI cloud contracts and ra
